title: hypericum scopulorum
intro: Hypericum scopulorum, also known as Wood's Rose or Cliff St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the St. John's Wort family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hypericum scopulorum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce anxiety and depression, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Hypericum scopulorum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote healing and overall well-being.
